title: myroxylon infestum
intro: Myroxylon infestum, also known as the Guarea glabra, is a plant species within the family Meliaceae, native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Myroxylon infestum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Myroxylon infestum can be found in various forms, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
